zh.lifeSummary: Hamelin de Warenne 4th Earl of Surrey是Geoffrey Plantagenet Count of Anjou的兒子，於大約1130年出生在法國洛易-吉黑布盧瓦。他於1164年4月與Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey在英國素瑞結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1202年5月7日在英國英格蘭素可列維斯列維斯 聖 約翰 維特享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可列維斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hamelin de Warenne 4th Earl of Surrey是Geoffrey Plantagenet Count of Anjou的儿子，于大约1130年出生在法国洛易-吉黑布盧瓦。他于1164年4月与Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey在英国素瑞结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1202年5月7日在英国英格兰素可列維斯列維斯 聖 約翰 維特享年73岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可列維斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hamelin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cecile, Dominique, Etienne, Jacques, Jean-Paul, Lucien, Monique, Normand, Renald.

variants.name: Hamel
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the tree (Old English hæsel), or its light reddish-brown nuts. This is one of the most successful of the names coined in the 19th century from words denoting plants.

en.lifeSummary: Hamelin de Warenne 4th Earl of Surrey was born about 1130, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, France as the son of Geoffrey Plantagenet Count of Anjou. He married Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey in April 1164, in Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died on 7 May 1202, in Lewes St John Without, Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73, and was buried in Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Hamelin de Warenne 4th Earl of Surrey est né environ 1130, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, France, fils de Geoffrey Plantagenet Count of Anjou. Il a épousé Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey en avril 1164, à Surrey, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 7 mai 1202, à Lewes St John Without, Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat im April 1164 in Surrey, England Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 7. Mai 1202 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Lewes St John Without, Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Hamelin de Warenne 4th Earl of Surrey è nato il circa 1130 nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Francia come figlio di Geoffrey Plantagenet Count of Anjou. Lui sposato Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey nel aprile 1164, nel Surrey, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì il 7 maggio 1202, nel Lewes St John Without, Lewes, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Lewes, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hamelin de Warenne 4th Earl of Surreyは約1130年にフランスロイル-エト-チャーブロイスでGeoffrey Plantagenet Count of Anjouの息子として生まれた。1164年4月にイギリススリーでIsabella de Warenne Countess of Surreyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1202年5月7日にイギリスイギリススセックスルスルス スト ジョン ウィソウトで73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hamelin de Warenne 4th Earl of Surrey(은)는 대략 1130년 프랑스 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 Geoffrey Plantagenet Count of Anjou의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1164년 4월 영국 수리에서 Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1202년 5월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 루스 루스 스트 존 위토우트에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 루스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hamelin de Warenne 4th Earl of Surrey nasceu aproximadamente 1130, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, França filho de Geoffrey Plantagenet Count of Anjou. Ele casou-se com Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey em abril de 1164, em Surrey, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de maio de 1202, em Lewes St John Without, Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Hamelin de Warenne 4th Earl of Surrey родился около 1130 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, Франция. Его отца звали Geoffrey Plantagenet Count of Anjou. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey апрель 1164 г. в местности сурри, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер 7 мая 1202 г. в местности львесь ст джон витоут, львесь, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности львесь, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
